title: CAPXEL Security — DOSXIER | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceIntelligence-Grade Security for Those Who ProtectCAPXEL Security — a separate intelligence division powered by the same deep-data AI infrastructure.Talk to CAPXELView CAPXEL Security PracticesThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.Meet DOSXIERDecision-ready intelligence, delivered in under 24 hoursDOSXIER is the world's first AI intelligence system that compiles and delivers complete, decision-ready subject analyses in under 24 hours. Collection is 93% faster — without sacrificing rigor.Built on CAPXEL infrastructureCAPXEL Security is a separate division — powered by the same deep-data AI foundations that drive our consumer intelligence products.Visit capxelsecurity.com 8 Intelligence CategoriesDOSXIER compiles and synthesizes intelligence across eight core categories — delivered as a clean, decision-ready report.Identity IntelligenceCore identity resolution, verification, and key identifiers.Contact & CommunicationsPhone, email, and communications surface area for lawful outreach and verification.Associates & NetworksRelationship mapping and contextual networks tied to the subject.Occupational FootprintEmployment, professional presence, and work-linked signals.Criminal & VehicularLawful public-record and vehicular context where applicable.Digital & DarkwebDigital footprint intelligence and exposed-signal discovery.Behavioral & PsychologicalPattern and risk signal synthesis to support protective decision-making.Threat / Geo / Cognitive AnalysisThreat context, geographic risk factors, and decision-ready prioritization.Who It's ForProfessionals who protect people and organizations — and need fast, lawful, decision-ready intelligence.Executive ProtectionDossiers that accelerate planning, route decisions, and threat screening.Private InvestigationDecision-ready subject analysis delivered fast — built for field reality.Corporate SecurityFaster, cleaner intelligence for risk teams protecting people, facilities, and operations.Law EnforcementSupportive analysis from lawful sources — designed to reduce collection time and improve clarity.Speed Meets Substance93% faster collection. <24h delivery. 100% lawful sources.DOSXIER compresses collection, verification, and synthesis into a single intelligence workflow — so teams can make faster, safer decisions.CAPXEL SecurityJoin the waitlistThis is a bridge page. The full experience lives at capxelsecurity.com.Join the Waitlist Talk to CAPXELRelated: Data Security · SPYBOX · INSPEX
